pulseNotes: 2026-06-22 03:30 MDT: Refreshed the Gumroad bundle packet with the latest live public truth. The bundle page still resolves at $59 and the profile root remains healthy, but the public Gumroad post is still the weakest live discovery surface because its meta description clips at `reactivati`; next move is seller-side post source inspection only, not more public-root churn.

2026-06-22 03:22 MDT: Killed one bounded Hermes Gumroad pass after it produced no stdout, then verified the public Gumroad post directly from raw HTML instead of treating fetch truncation as uncertainty. The live post still exposes a real 150-character `meta name="description"` value clipped at `reactivati`, while the root (`97` chars) and bundle page (`234` chars) metadata remain healthy; the fulfillment writer also stayed flat at 3 commerce signals with 0 rows appended. Next move: only spend the next Gumroad seller pass on the public post source itself; otherwise stay on reply/bounce watch or skill capture.

2026-06-22 03:17 MDT: Re-ran the Gmail-backed sales intake writer in live mode after the latest public-surface check. It found the same 3 Gumroad/Etsy/Fiverr commerce signals and appended 0 rows, so fulfillment monitoring stays current. Next move: keep reply/bounce watch on deck and use the next open Gumroad pass on seller-side post source only if access is clean.
